title: dombeya decanthera subsp. farafanganica
intro: Dombeya decanthera subsp. farafanganica, also known as the Farafangana silk-floss tree, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dombeya decanthera subsp. farafanganica include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and treat digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
